2266870.name: Valley of the Old Masters
2266870.description:
Since the discovery of the tablet of the Old Masters, the world has been caught in the winds of change, and the future is full of uncertainty. As a wandering artist, your journey leads you to a mystical valley. Will you find inspiration for your art there?

Valley of the Old Masters is an old-school action-adventure game. It features a cryptic world full of secrets to uncover, a mysterious backstory, and many challenges and puzzles to solve.

  • Wander through a mysterious valley.

  • Find ancient sketches and paintings. Be inspired by them and draw your own sketches to fill your sketchbook.

  • Meet other wanderers who are just as lost as you.

  • Discover dungeons filled with mysterious and cryptic puzzles.

  • Unravel the mystery of the Old Masters. Who were they, and why did they disappear?
2266870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
